content:
# Magmatic Origin

**Summary**: The formation of minerals or rocks from the cooling and crystallization of magma.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2024-al-hakimi|Al-Hakimi, 2024]] confirmed the magmatic origin of zircons in the granitic rocks.

## Scientific Context

- [[2024-al-hakimi|Al-Hakimi, 2024]] Distinguishing magmatic zircons from metamorphic ones.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2024-al-hakimi|Al-Hakimi, 2024]] Th/U ratio analysis.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- Zircons showed high Th/U ratios (0.1 to 1.7%) indicating a magmatic origin. ([[2024-al-hakimi|Al-Hakimi, 2024, p. 79]])
